name: Paradise Cake (Scottish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (Mark 4).
2. Grease an 11 inch x 7 inch baking tin.
3. Roll out the pastry on a floured surface and line the prepared tin.
4. Bake the pastry blind for 10 minutes.
5. In a bowl, cream together the margarine and caster sugar until smooth.
6. Beat in the egg and stir in the cherries, walnuts, and ground almonds.
7. Add vanilla essence and mix well.
8. Spread a layer of raspberry jam over the bottom of the pastry case.
9. Spoon the filling mixture evenly over the jam.
10. Bake for 30-35 minutes until set.
11. Dust with caster sugar and allow to cool in the tin.
12. Once cooled, cut into squares.
